description_long: This is a bronze-colored Corinthian-style helmet with a prominent crest running from the front to the back along the top. The helmet features a smooth, rounded dome that covers the entire head, with a pronounced brow ridge and a T-shaped opening for the eyes and mouth. The crest is reinforced with rivets and appears to be made of metal, adding both decorative and functional value. The sides of the helmet extend downward to protect the cheeks, while the back curves to shield the neck. The surface is highly polished, giving it a glossy, reflective appearance with subtle hints of patina. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation openings, and the interior is likely hollow to accommodate a human head.
description: A glossy bronze Corinthian-style helmet with a prominent metal crest and T-shaped facial opening, featuring a smooth, reflective surface and no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-shaped eye and mouth opening, the pronounced brow ridge, and the start of the crest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the metal crest, the smooth dome, and the cheek guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back curve of the helmet and the crest running centrally from front to back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crest, dome, and cheek guard from the opposite angle.
